data.current_description: Gets all `Layer` objects to which the client has access.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all Layer objects accessible to the authenticated client. Supports pagination via x-next-token header for large result sets. Returns an array of Layer objects containing provider, type, and metadata. An empty array is returned if no layers are accessible.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Available Layers' is a noun phrase rather than action-oriented. Description lacks details about pagination support, return structure, and authentication context. message: Operation 'postLayer' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable. Summary is adequate and action-oriented. Description is incomplete and vague about the actual workflow. Enhanced version clarifies this is step one of a multi-step process, specifies the return value (signed S3 URL), explains the subsequent action required, mentions URL expiration, and includes authentication/permission requirements. data.current_summary: Upload data to the specified layer
data.current_description: Step one in uploading a data product to a layer.  The method will return a signed s3 url to which the caller may upload the data.
data.description_suggestion: Initiates a data upload to the specified layer by provider and type. Returns a signed AWS S3 URL for direct file upload. This is the first step in a two-step upload process; the caller must subsequently upload the data file to the returned S3 URL. The signed URL expires after a specified duration. Requires authentication and appropriate permissions for the target layer.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate and action-oriented. Description is incomplete and vague about the actual workflow. Enhanced version clarifies this is step one of a multi-step process, specifies the return value (signed S3 URL), explains the subsequent action required, mentions URL expiration, and includes authentication/permission requirements. This helps AI agents understand the full context and next steps.

data.current_summary: Update or correct data for a specific result.
data.summary_suggestion: Update a specific result in a layer
data.description_suggestion: Updates or corrects data for a specific Result identified by provider, type, and result ID. Accepts a Result object with updated fields. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated Result object with all current data. Requires authentication and write permissions for the target layer. Modification timestamp is automatically updated.
